title: CarTrade Tech shares rocket 6% as Nomura raises target price. Here are 3 reasons why
description: CarTrade Tech shares rose after Nomura reiterated its 'Buy' rating and raised its target price, citing stronger growth prospects for OLX. The brokerage expects artificial intelligence-led monetisation, new revenue streams, expanding margins and rising adoption of financing, escrow and logistics services to support long-term earnings growth.
content: Shares of CarTrade Tech rallied as much as 6% to their day’s high of Rs 2,846 on the BSE on Wednesday after international brokerage Nomura reiterated its 'Buy' rating and raised its target price to Rs 3,286 from Rs 2,740, implying an upside of 22% fr... [4892 chars]

title: Reliance Power shares surge 18% on foraying into AI, allied new-age technologies
description: The rally came after the company, in an exchange filing, said it has undertaken certain enabling steps through its subsidiaries to participate in the rapidly evolving field of artificial intelligence and allied new-age technologies.
content:
Reliance Power shares climbed more than 18 percent in early trade on Wednesday after the company announced its foray into artificial intelligence (AI) and allied new-age technologies.

title: Japan plans sovereign AI model, 10 million AI robots
description: Japan plans to develop a homegrown artificial intelligence model and have 10 million AI-equipped robots operating in more than a dozen sectors by 2040, the government said. "This strategy sets a target of approximately 10 million robots to be deployed by 2040 and, with the addition of the restaurant, food manufacturing and medical sectors, will vigorously promote social implementation across a total of 18 fields," Industry Minister Ryosei Akazawa told reporters.
content:

title: Reliance Power shares soar 10%, snap 4-day losing streak. What’s triggering the sharp surge?
description: Reliance Power shares rose sharply on Wednesday, snapping a four-day losing streak after the company announced plans to expand into artificial intelligence and technology-driven businesses through its subsidiaries. The company renamed four subsidiaries to reflect the AI-focused strategy, boosting investor sentiment despite weak recent financial performance.

title: Employers who laid off workers for AI are reversing their decisions
description: Companies are realizing artificial intelligence can't do everything after all, prompting them to rehire employees to grow their businesses
content:
Companies are rapidly changing their minds that artificial intelligence can "do it all" by rehiring employees to propel their businesses forward, as investors fret over the longevity of the ongoing AI boom happening in the financial markets.

title: AWS CEO pushes back on AI job fears, says Amazon is hiring 11,000 graduates
description: Amazon Web Services CEO Matt Garman has pushed back against predictions that artificial intelligence will eliminate large numbers of entry-level jobs. While acknowledging AI will reshape the workplace, he argues companies still need young talent, pointing to Amazon's plan to hire 11,000 interns and recent graduates this year.
content: As debate over artificial intelligence’s impact on employment intensifies, Amazon Web Services (AWS) CEO Matt Garman has dismissed predictions that AI will wipe out large numbers of entry-level office jobs, arguing instead that businesses risk making... [4339 chars]
